marketing.heroTagline: Stand out in your scholarship application
marketing.heroTitle: Stand out with essays that impress
marketing.heroDescription: Intelligent AI-powered essay evaluation. Get detailed feedback, rewrite suggestions, and increase your chances of approval for scholarships like Chevening.
marketing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to get started
marketing.featuresDescription: Production-friendly defaults, extensible patterns, and a clean user interface.
marketing.faqSubtitle: Answers to common questions about StandOut.
marketing.faq1a: StandOut is a platform that uses artificial intelligence to evaluate and improve your scholarship application essays for programs like Chevening.
marketing.faq2a: You write your essay in the editor, submit it for analysis, and receive detailed feedback with a score, strengths, areas for improvement, and rewrite suggestions.
marketing.faq3q: How much does each analysis cost?
marketing.faq3a: Each analysis uses 10 credits. You can purchase credits through our subscription plans.
marketing.faq4q: What types of essays are supported?
marketing.faq4a: We currently support the 4 Chevening essays: Leadership, Networking, Course Choices, and Career Plan.

dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Prepare competitive essays with intelligent AI feedback.
dashboard.step1Desc: Select Chevening or Fulbright to start working on your essays.
dashboard.step2Desc: Use the editor to write and refine your essays with auto-save.
dashboard.step3Desc: Get detailed feedback, scores, and rewrite suggestions.
dashboard.cheveningDesc: UK government scholarship. 4 essays, 300 words each. Focus on leadership, networking, course choices, and career plan.
dashboard.fulbrightDesc: US academic exchange program. 2 essays, 1000 words each. Research project and personal statement.
dashboard.fulbrightOfficialDesc: Information about categories and application process.
dashboard.essayTipsDesc: Use concrete examples, STAR structure, and revise multiple times.
dashboard.emptyStateDesc: Start writing your first essay to see your progress here.
